headline: Are Wall Street Analysts Bullish on Parker-Hannifin Stock?
summary: Parker-Hannifin has outperformed the broader market over the past year, and analysts remain highly optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

headline: Deal Dispatch: IMAX Mulls Potential Sale, Shein Buys Everlane, West Marine Bankruptcy
summary: Major M&A deals this week include Cohere acquiring Reliant AI and Authentic Brands buys denim brand Lee. Bitcoin Depot announces bankruptcy.

headline: Parker-Hannifin: Aerospace Strength Still Justifies The Premium
summary: Parker-Hannifin delivered record Q3 FY26 results, with adjusted EPS of $8.17 and aerospace backlog at $12.5 billion. Read why PH stock is downgraded to hold.
